retrieval_order.use_for: Primary comping methodology and decision framework.
Normal flip pricing, trendline construction, and weighting logic.
Subdivision decisions, lot design, and hidden-value analysis.
Final evaluation output schema and section ordering.
Visual land-type identification and supporting field heuristics.
Rural discount rules and extreme-access adjustments.
Advanced subdivision edge cases and hidden value scenarios.

excluded_from_retrieval.reason: Very likely redundant with the merged handbook. Keep for audit, not retrieval.

rules: Use the merged handbook as the default authority for general comping logic.
Use the pricing mastery guide to deepen normal flip pricing decisions.
Use the subdivision mastery guide for split potential, lot layout, and road-access logic.
Use the deliverable format document to shape the final output, not to make valuation decisions.
Use rural and advanced subdivision documents as special-case overrides when the subject clearly fits those scenarios.
Do not retrieve the duplicate handbook copy unless you are auditing changes between versions.
